name: pbs
description: German Planungsbüro document workflow assistant. Orchestrator coordinates drafting, review, and finalization of B-Plan Begründungen, Textliche Festsetzungen, Umweltberichte, and Gutachten across the (universal × domain × state) scope axes. Local in-process RAG backend (LanceDB + bge-m3 + reranker), layered manifests, per-project memory under <project>/_ai/ or .ai/.
